title: Amtech M1300 150mm (6") Hacksaw blades (12 pack)
features: DURABLE: These 150mm (6") hacksaw blades are made from tough, black-finished 32 TPI carbon steel and are suitable for use with most mini hacksaw frames
VERSATILE: They are ideal for fast and accurate cutting of any metal or plastic objects
EASY TO USE: Simple setup and operation for beginners and professionals
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 12pc mini hacksaw blades See more
